title: [MTR4] Frankfurt U-Bahn Bombardier U5 Pack
description: A resourcepack that adds the Frankfurt Bombardier U5 trains to the Minecraft Transit Railway mod
body:
A resourcepack that adds the Frankfurt Bombardier U5 trains to the Minecraft Transit Railway mod.



Disclaimer:
This resourcepack is not an official product of Bombardier or Verkehrsgesellschaft Frankfurt am Main (VGF),
